classes.reasoning: This is a conference abstract submitted to ESMO (European Society for Medical Oncology) Annual Congress 2023, with submission date, acceptance status, and author affiliations from multiple institutions. It is a published medical literature artifact presenting trial results, not a trial operational document.

indication: EGFR-mutant advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with progression on osimertinib
summary: This is a conference abstract submitted to and accepted for oral presentation at the ESMO 2023 Annual Congress. It presents Phase II interim results for BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in EGFR-mutant NSCLC patients who progressed on osimertinib, reporting efficacy and safety outcomes from the BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 trial.
